/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/sil-kit-registry.dir/Registry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sil-kit-registry.dir/WindowsServiceMain.cpp.o" config/CMakeFiles/O_SilKitRegistry_Config.dir/RegistryConfiguration.cpp.o ../../SilKit/source/util/CMakeFiles/O_SilKit_Util_SignalHandler.dir/SignalHandler.cpp.o -o ../../Release/sil-kit-registry  ../../SilKit/source/libS_SilKitImpl.a ../../SilKit/source/dashboard/libO_SilKit_Dashboard.a ../../SilKit/source/libS_SilKitImpl.a -ldl ../../ThirdParty/_tp_spdlog/libspdlog.a ../../ThirdParty/_tp_oatpp/src/liboatpp.a ../../ThirdParty/_tp_fmt/libfmt.a ../../ThirdParty/_tp_rapidyaml/librapidyaml-static.a
